instruction: Fix the identifier so it matches the physical column on the narrow events table.
broken_query: SELECT evt_id, device FROM chqr_tasks.t_evt_narrow LIMIT 5
gold_query: SELECT event_id, device FROM chqr_tasks.t_evt_narrow LIMIT 5
simulated_error: Unknown identifier 'evt_id' — check spelling against the MergeTree definition.
schema_hint: Columns are event_id (UUID string), device, score.
setup_sql: CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS chqr_tasks; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS chqr_tasks.t_evt_narrow; CREATE TABLE chqr_tasks.t_evt_narrow (event_id String, device String, score Float32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (event_id); INSERT INTO chqr_tasks.t_evt_narrow VALUES ('e1', 'pda', 0.4), ('e2', 'kiosk', 0.9), ('e3', 'web', 0.2)
